zh.Hardingham, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可哈丁加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nazareth Devoroys於1586年4月3日之前出生在英國諾福爾可哈丁加姆時，她的父親Edmund Devoroys31歲，母親Ursula Pitcher26歲。她於1611年7月30日與Allen Flegg在英國諾福爾可哈丁加姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Hardingham, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可哈丁加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nazareth Devoroys于1586年4月3日之前出生在英国諾福爾可哈丁加姆时，她的父亲Edmund Devoroys31岁，母亲Ursula Pitcher26岁。她于1611年7月30日与Allen Flegg在英国諾福爾可哈丁加姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Nazareth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Religious name, referring to Christ's native village, Nazareth.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Nazareth Devoroys was born before 3 April 1586, in Hardingham, Norfolk, England, her father, Edmund Devoroys, was 31 and her mother, Ursula Pitcher, was 26. She married Allen Flegg on 30 July 1611, in Hardingham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nazareth Devoroys est née avant 3 avril 1586, à Hardingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Devoroys, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ursula Pitcher, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Allen Flegg le 30 juillet 1611, à Hardingham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nazareth Devoroys vor 3. April 1586 in Hardingham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Devoroys 31 und ihre Mutter Ursula Pitcher 26. Sie hat am 30. Juli 1611 in Hardingham, Norfolk, England Allen Flegg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nazareth Devoroys è nata il prima del 3 aprile 1586 nel Hardingham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Edmund Devoroys, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Ursula Pitcher, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Allen Flegg il 30 luglio 1611, nel Hardingham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli.

ja.Hardingham, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクハーディンガム
ja.lifeSummary: Nazareth Devoroysが1586年4月3日以前にイギリスノーフォルクハーディンガムで生まれた時，父Edmund Devoroysは31歳，母Ursula Pitcherは26歳であった。1611年7月30日にイギリスノーフォルクハーディンガムでAllen Fleggと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Nazareth Devoroys(이)가 1586년 4월 3일 이전 영국 노르폴크 하르딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Devoroys(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ursula Pitcher(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1611년 7월 30일 영국 노르폴크 하르딩함에서 Allen Flegg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다.

mn.Hardingham, Norfolk, England: Hardingham, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nazareth Devoroys nasceu antes 3 de abril de 1586, em Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Devoroys, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Ursula Pitcher, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Allen Flegg em 30 de julho de 1611, em Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nazareth Devoroys родилась перед 3 апрель 1586 г. в местности хардингхам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Devoroys было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ursula Pitcher, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Allen Flegg 30 июля 1611 г. в местности хардингхам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nazareth Devoroys nació antes de 3 de abril de 1586, en Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Devoroys, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Ursula Pitcher, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Allen Flegg el 30 de julio de 1611, en Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos.
